subject: Two warriors leap and charge in tandem, each holding a blade, against an open sky background
description: Two humanoid warriors are shown mid-leap in a side-by-side charge, both airborne. The figure on the left wears brown leather and has pale hair with visible hook-and-cord equipment consistent with Kor aesthetic; they hold a blade. The figure on the right wears lighter plate armor with gold trim and holds a longer blade. Both figures face the same direction, moving in apparent coordination. The background is open sky with soft gray-blue clouds. The dynamic poses suggest a coordinated assault. The image is light and airy despite the violent subject matter.
foreground: Two armored warriors mid-leap with blades drawn
emotion: fierce coordinated determination — two fighters moving as one
